channel.title: AI Unfiltered
channel.description: Chinese AI • Open Source • Security • Incidents. Signal, not noise.

item.title: Federated Inference: Toward Privacy-Preserving Collaborative and Incentivized Model Serving
item.description: arXiv:2603.02214v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Federated Inference (FI) studies how independently trained and privately owned models can collaborate at inference time without sharing data or model parameters. While recent work has explored secure and distributed inference from disparate...

item.title: Engineering Reasoning and Instruction (ERI) Benchmark: A Large Taxonomy-driven Dataset for Foundation Models and Agents
item.description: arXiv:2603.02239v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The Engineering Reasoning and Instruction (ERI) benchmark is a taxonomy-driven instruction dataset designed to train and evaluate engineering-capable large language models (LLMs) and agents. This dataset spans nine engineering fields (namely: civil,...

item.title: SuperLocalMemory: Privacy-Preserving Multi-Agent Memory with Bayesian Trust Defense Against Memory Poisoning
item.description: arXiv:2603.02240v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We present SuperLocalMemory, a local-first memory system for multi-agent AI that defends against OWASP ASI06 memory poisoning through architectural isolation and Bayesian trust scoring, while personalizing retrieval through adaptive learning-to-rank...

item.title: Estimating Visual Attribute Effects in Advertising from Observational Data: A Deepfake-Informed Double Machine Learning Approach
item.description: arXiv:2603.02359v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Digital advertising increasingly relies on visual content, yet marketers lack rigorous methods for understanding how specific visual attributes causally affect consumer engagement. This paper addresses a fundamental methodological challenge:...

item.title: Can machines be uncertain?
item.description: arXiv:2603.02365v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The paper investigates whether and how AI systems can realize states of uncertainty. By adopting a functionalist and behavioral perspective, it examines how symbolic, connectionist and hybrid architectures make room for uncertainty. The paper...

item.title: RxnNano:Training Compact LLMs for Chemical Reaction and Retrosynthesis Prediction via Hierarchical Curriculum Learning
item.description: arXiv:2603.02215v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Chemical reaction prediction is pivotal for accelerating drug discovery and synthesis planning. Despite advances in data-driven models, current approaches are hindered by an overemphasis on parameter and dataset scaling. Some methods coupled with...

item.title: ATPO: Adaptive Tree Policy Optimization for Multi-Turn Medical Dialogue
item.description: arXiv:2603.02216v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Effective information seeking in multi-turn medical dialogues is critical for accurate diagnosis, especially when dealing with incomplete information. Aligning Large Language Models (LLMs) for these interactive scenarios is challenging due to the...

item.title: Is Retraining-Free Enough? The Necessity of Router Calibration for Efficient MoE Compression
item.description: arXiv:2603.02217v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models scale capacity efficiently, but their massive parameter footprint creates a deployment-time memory bottleneck. We organize retraining-free MoE compression into three paradigms - Expert Pruning, Expert Editing, and...

item.title: Self-Play Only Evolves When Self-Synthetic Pipeline Ensures Learnable Information Gain
item.description: arXiv:2603.02218v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) make it plausible to build systems that improve through self-evolving loops, but many existing proposals are better understood as self-play and often plateau quickly. A central failure mode is that the loop synthesises...

item.title: NExT-Guard: Training-Free Streaming Safeguard without Token-Level Labels
item.description: arXiv:2603.02219v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Large language models are increasingly deployed in streaming scenarios, rendering conventional post-hoc safeguards ineffective as they fail to interdict unsafe content in real-time. While streaming safeguards based on token-level supervised training...

item.title: A Zipf-preserving, long-range correlated surrogate for written language and other symbolic sequences
item.description: arXiv:2603.02213v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Symbolic sequences such as written language and genomic DNA display characteristic frequency distributions and long-range correlations extending over many symbols. In language, this takes the form of Zipf's law for word frequencies together with...

item.title: Universal Conceptual Structure in Neural Translation: Probing NLLB-200's Multilingual Geometry
item.description: arXiv:2603.02258v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Do neural machine translation models learn language-universal conceptual representations, or do they merely cluster languages by surface similarity? We investigate this question by probing the representation geometry of Meta's NLLB-200, a 200-language...

item.title: Characterizing Memorization in Diffusion Language Models: Generalized Extraction and Sampling Effects
item.description: arXiv:2603.02333v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Autoregressive language models (ARMs) have been shown to memorize and occasionally reproduce training data verbatim, raising concerns about privacy and copyright liability. Diffusion language models (DLMs) have recently emerged as a competitive...

item.title: Detecting AI-Generated Essays in Writing Assessment: Responsible Use and Generalizability Across LLMs
item.description: arXiv:2603.02353v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Writing is a foundational literacy skill that underpins effective communication, fosters critical thinking, facilitates learning across disciplines, and enables individuals to organize and articulate complex ideas. Consequently, writing assessment...

item.title: RO-N3WS: Enhancing Generalization in Low-Resource ASR with Diverse Romanian Speech Benchmarks
item.description: arXiv:2603.02368v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We introduce RO-N3WS, a benchmark Romanian speech dataset designed to improve generalization in automatic speech recognition (ASR), particularly in low-resource and out-of-distribution (OOD) conditions. RO-N3WS comprises over 126 hours of transcribed...

item.title: [AINews] Anthropic @ $19B ARR, Qwen team leaves, Gemini and GPT bump up fast models
item.description: a quiet day

item.title: Flowith Raises Multi-Million Dollar Seed Round to Build an Action-Oriented OS for the Agentic AI Era
item.description: Flowith has raised multi-million dollar seed funding to build an action-driven OS designed for the next wave of autonomous AI agents.

item.title: Tencent Sets April Launch for ‘Honor of Kings: World’
item.description: Tencent’s open-world adventure Honor of Kings: World is set to launch April 30, expanding the blockbuster IP into a large-scale Eastern fantasy universe.

item.title: Honor Open-Sources Agent Foundation Model MagicAgent at MWC 2026
item.description: Honor has open-sourced MagicAgent, a 30B-parameter MoE agent model built for advanced task planning and heterogeneous orchestration.

item.title: OPPO to Launch OPPO Find X9 Ultra Globally for the First Time
item.description: OPPO will launch the Find X9 Ultra globally for the first time, betting on ultra-premium imaging and satellite connectivity to expand its high-end footprint.

item.title: RayNeo and Deutsche Telekom Debut Agentic AI Smart Glasses at MWC 2026
item.description: RayNeo and Deutsche Telekom unveiled agentic AI-powered AR glasses at MWC 2026, signaling a push toward standalone, service-driven smart wearables.

item.title: WAF Challenge requests incorrectly forwarded to origin
item.description: Mar 3, 23:42 UTCResolved - This incident has been resolved.Mar 3, 22:15 UTCInvestigating - Cloudflare is investigating an issue where origins may receive challenge solve requests instead of the original challenged request. This issue affects customers using WAF Challenge actions globally.We are...

item.title: Pages builds unable to start
item.description: Mar 3, 21:29 UTCResolved - This incident has been resolved.Mar 3, 21:18 UTCMonitoring - A fix has been implemented and we are monitoring the results.Mar 3, 21:03 UTCInvestigating - Cloudflare is aware of and investigating an issue impacting Pages builds. Customers may see their Pages builds fail to...

item.title: Claude Opus 4.6 Fast not appearing for some Copilot users
item.description: Mar 3, 20:31 UTCInvestigating - We are investigating reports of degraded performance for Copilot

item.title: Incident with Copilot and Actions
item.description: Mar 3, 20:09 UTCResolved - This incident has been resolved. Thank you for your patience and understanding as we addressed this issue. A detailed root cause analysis will be shared as soon as it is available.Mar 3, 20:06 UTCUpdate - We're seeing recovery across all services. We're continuing to...

item.title: Iranian Strikes on Amazon Data Centers Highlight Industry’s Vulnerability to Physical Disasters
item.description: Two AWS data centers in the United Arab Emirates were “directly struck” and another facility in Bahrain was also damaged after a drone landed nearby. The post Iranian Strikes on Amazon Data Centers Highlight Industry’s Vulnerability to Physical Disasters appeared first on SecurityWeek.

item.title: Fake Tech Support Spam Deploys Customized Havoc C2 Across Organizations
item.description: Threat hunters have called attention to a new campaign as part of which bad actors masqueraded as fake IT support to deliver the Havoc command-and-control (C2) framework as a precursor to data exfiltration or ransomware attack. The intrusions, identified by Huntress last month across five partner...

item.title: PRX Part 3 — Training a Text-to-Image Model in 24h!
Outage in Admin API
item.description: Mar 3, 16:49 UTCInvestigating - The team is currently investigating an issue affecting the admin API and some reporting screens in the Console

item.title: Elevated errors in ChatGPT file uploads
item.description: Status: IdentifiedWe have identified that users are experiencing elevated errors for the impacted services. We are working on implementing a mitigation.Affected components File uploads (Degraded performance)

item.title: Cloudflare Zero Trust: Gateway Issues
item.description: Mar 3, 16:44 UTCInvestigating - Cloudflare is investigating issues with Gateway. Performance and connectivity through Gateway may be impacted. We are working to understand the full impact and mitigate this problem. More updates to follow shortly.

item.title: Elevated errors on Claude Sonnet 4.6
item.description: Mar 3, 16:38 UTCResolved - This incident has been resolved.Mar 3, 15:40 UTCInvestigating - We are currently investigating this issue.

item.title: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite: Built for intelligence at scale
item.description: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite is our fastest and most cost-efficient Gemini 3 series model yet.

item.title: Latest open artifacts (#19): Qwen 3.5, GLM 5, MiniMax 2.5 — Chinese labs' latest push of the frontier
item.description: Welcome to the year of the horse!

item.title: Fig Security Launches With $38 Million to Bolster SecOps Resilience
item.description: The company was founded in March 2025 and it has now emerged from stealth mode. The post Fig Security Launches With $38 Million to Bolster SecOps Resilience appeared first on SecurityWeek.

item.title: MIT Technology Review Insiders Panel
Elevated errors on Claude Haiku 4.5
item.description: Mar 3, 15:39 UTCResolved - This incident has been resolved.Mar 3, 14:51 UTCInvestigating - We are currently investigating this issue.

item.title: Honeywell, Researcher Clash Over Impact of Building Controller Vulnerability
item.description: The researcher says he has identified thousands of internet-exposed IQ4 building management controllers. The post Honeywell, Researcher Clash Over Impact of Building Controller Vulnerability appeared first on SecurityWeek.

item.title: Building a High-Impact Tier 1: The 3 Steps CISOs Must Follow
item.description: Every CISO knows the uncomfortable truth about their Security Operations Center: the people most responsible for catching threats in real time are the people with the least experience. Tier 1 analysts sit at the front line of detection, and yet they are also the most vulnerable to the cognitive and...

item.title: Open-Source CyberStrikeAI Deployed in AI-Driven FortiGate Attacks Across 55 Countries
item.description: The threat actor behind the recently disclosed artificial intelligence (AI)-assisted campaign targeting Fortinet FortiGate appliances leveraged an open-source, AI-native security testing platform called CyberStrikeAI to execute the attacks. The new findings come from Team Cymru, which detected its...

item.title: Quantum Decryption of RSA is Much Closer than Expected
item.description: For decades, the quantum threat to RSA and ECC encryption has been tied to Shor’s algorithm and the assumption that we would need million-qubit quantum computers to make it practical. A newly announced algorithm challenges that assumption and suggests the breaking point could arrive far sooner than...

item.title: New ‘AirSnitch’ Attack Shows Wi-Fi Client Isolation Could Be a False Sense of Security
item.description: Researchers have uncovered a Wi-Fi vulnerability that allows nearby attackers to intercept sensitive data and execute machine-in-the-middle attacks against connected devices. The post New ‘AirSnitch’ Attack Shows Wi-Fi Client Isolation Could Be a False Sense of Security appeared first...

item.title: The Download: The startup that says it can stop lightning, and inside OpenAI’s Pentagon deal
item.description: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. This startup claims it can stop lightning and prevent catastrophic wildfires Startup Skyward Wildfire says it can prevent catastrophic...

item.title: AI Agents: The Next Wave Identity Dark Matter - Powerful, Invisible, and Unmanaged
item.description: The Rise of MCPs in the Enterprise The Model Context Protocol (MCP) is quickly becoming a practical way to push LLMs from “chat” into real work. By providing structured access to applications, APIs, and data, MCP enables prompt-driven AI agents that can retrieve information, take action, and...

item.title: Starkiller Phishing Suite Uses AitM Reverse Proxy to Bypass Multi-Factor Authentication
item.description: Cybersecurity researchers have disclosed details of a new phishing suite called Starkiller that proxies legitimate login pages to bypass multi-factor authentication (MFA) protections. It's advertised as a cybercrime platform by a threat group calling itself Jinkusu, granting customers access to a...

item.title: Performance degradation in Paris, France
item.description: Mar 3, 10:46 UTCResolved - This incident has been resolved.Mar 3, 09:17 UTCInvestigating - Some users in Paris, France may experience increased latency or timeouts.

item.title: This startup claims it can stop lightning and prevent catastrophic wildfires
item.description: On June 1, 2023, as a sweltering heat wave baked Quebec, thousands of lightning strikes flashed across the province, setting off more than 120 wildfires. The blazes ripped through parched forests and withered grasslands, burned for weeks, and compounded what was rapidly turning into Canada’s worst...

item.title: Elevated errors on Claude Opus 4.6
item.description: Mar 3, 08:31 UTCIdentified - The issue has been identified and a fix is being implemented.Mar 3, 06:59 UTCInvestigating - We are currently investigating this issue.

item.title: [AINews] Truth in the time of Artifice
item.description: A quiet day lets us question the nature of reality

item.title: Elevated errors in claude.ai, cowork, platform, claude code
item.description: Mar 3, 04:43 UTCUpdate - We are continuing to investigate this issue.Mar 3, 04:41 UTCUpdate - We are continuing to investigate this issue.Mar 3, 04:39 UTCUpdate - We are continuing to investigate this issue.Mar 3, 03:15 UTCInvestigating - We are currently investigating this issue.
